ramona: timeworn
the ramona alter you can get by doing her story and paying 60 standard pulls

doll healing falls off after a while, shes more useful for the weakness
late game enemies hit for like 400+ dmg every turn so healing is not really a viable survival strat
Oh! I didn't know that -- I'll be right on it
I'm guessing shielding and weakening is better?
yeah, if theres 1000 incoming damage and you weaken the boss, that's like you made a 250 point shield
and shield is more efficient than heal
rate of shield per arithmetica is something like twice as good on average
because it only lasts for one turn
I guess I should be using Ryker's cards to look for shields
If you put lily in your team she can handle shields by herself

lily is much much stronger on defense than doll

I’m currently around Chapter 5 and starting to think more seriously about my long-term team setup. Could anyone recommend some solid team compositions to aim for at this stage of the game? I’d really appreciate guidance on which general team archetypes work well, as well as specific characters and WoDs that are worth prioritizing or investing in extra copies of for progression going forward.
Casiah and Ryker immediately are showing me results -- battles are won in pretty much 2 turns!
e2 thais and e3 gmurphy u should try get while they have banners
and thais wheel

generally speaking, when making a team, you pick a carry and build around them

examples of viable carries you have are gmurphy, jenkin, lotan, nymphaea, and maybe sanga
gmurphy and thais are very strong and worth investing
and you should pull for thais wheel and tulu wheel

I started 2 weeks ago and cleared all of story normal mode with oe gmurphy, e2 Miriam, e2 tulu and e3 Goliath. They kinda suck for most of act one though because alot of their power is locked behind this gimmick called the soulforge. Would recommend swapping tulu for Thais for act 1 (which is not too bad given everything before act 7 is super easy) Not sure how easy is it to get Miriam though as she doesn’t have a banner up. I bought the blue 980 pure silver pack and pulled her
(ignore the skill levels I'll get around to it)

For arc 1 you can go gmurphy + tawil + miryam + celeste probably it will carry you just fine, celeste for emergency revive, miryam alienus bot, tawil gmurphy for the W.

However your tawil is currently E0, if you ever struggle with her like that ( you probably will ) then better go for someone else like normal murphy if you have
You could have done corpo + aurita but they are both E0 so might feel a bit rough to play them
However you can also do pollux + castor + jenkin
Last one can probably be ramona
The strat is you farm onyx cards from castor so you can debuff the enemies
Jenkin buff crit dmg by 150
Then pollux nuke
